description_long: This object depicts a person seated in a modern electric wheelchair, featuring a contoured seat, adjustable armrests, and a supportive headrest. The wheelchair is equipped with a robust frame, large drive wheels at the rear, and smaller caster wheels at the front for maneuverability. The seated figure is positioned upright, with arms resting on the armrests and legs supported by footrests. The wheelchair includes visible control modules and a joystick for navigation, as well as various mechanical linkages and support structures. The upholstery appears to be a dark, durable fabric, while the frame is constructed from metal and plastic components. The overall design suggests a high degree of comfort, support, and mobility for urban environments.
description: A person sits upright in a modern electric wheelchair with a contoured seat, headrest, and visible control joystick. The wheelchair features a sturdy metal frame, large rear wheels, and smaller front casters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person seated upright, with armrests, headrest, and footrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the seat, the position of the arms and legs, and the arrangement of the wheels and footrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, headrest, and the structure of the wheelchair frame and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mechanical linkages, control module, and the alignment of the seat and wheels.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two large rear wheels and two small front casters
attribute_seating_posture: upright with arms resting on armrests and legs supported by footrests
